head.title: Indiebox – Private AI. Ready to go.
hero.subtitle:
Indiebox is an AI server built for serious models.
Private. Fast. No subscriptions.
hero.alt.title: Indiebox
hero.alt.subtitle:
Real intelligence. Available instantly.
Performance. Under your control. Super simple.
story.intro.main:
Indiebox is the new reference for local AI for a reason.

Private AI without cloud, without telemetry, 100% local.
story.intro.subline: More power, more headroom: 128 GB of memory for modern reasoning models.
story.focus.title: Built for productive on-site AI
story.focus.text:
Chat, automation, and agents run on your platform.
Everything is set up, optimized, and ready immediately.
Built to grow with you.
boxes.privacy.title: EVERYTHING STAYS WITH YOU
boxes.privacy.body: Indiebox processes prompts, files, and responses entirely on the box. By default, nothing goes to the cloud: no telemetry, no hidden background connections. External services, model downloads, or support access exist only if you explicitly enable them, and you can verify this in your network.
boxes.usage.title: READY TO USE
boxes.usage.body: Unbox, connect, and go. Indiebox is preconfigured, updates are manual by default (one click), and your teams start without technical hurdles.
boxes.future.title: BUILT TO GROW
boxes.future.body: A stable environment with a future. Features can be extended without changing what exists. Partners and teams build their own solutions on top. Everything runs on a secure, working base.
overlay.usage.title: Why teams become productive quickly.
overlay.usage.body: Business owners need outcomes without long integration projects. Indiebox reduces everyday friction and gives teams a clear starting point.
overlay.usage.arguments.title: Key arguments
overlay.usage.arguments.items.0.title: Fast value instead of long onboarding cycles.
overlay.usage.arguments.items.0.body: From setup to first productive workflow takes hours, not weeks.
overlay.usage.arguments.items.1.title: Lower operational complexity.
overlay.usage.arguments.items.1.body: Team members work in one stable environment instead of individual workaround stacks.
overlay.usage.arguments.items.2.title: Predictable cost and accountability.
overlay.usage.arguments.items.2.body: No fluctuating cloud invoices caused by opaque usage paths.
overlay.usage.assurance.title: How we ensure this
overlay.usage.assurance.items.0.title: Preconfigured core workflows.
overlay.usage.assurance.items.0.body: Models, base tools, and common flows are prepared so teams can start immediately.
overlay.usage.assurance.items.1.title: Controlled updates.
overlay.usage.assurance.items.1.body: Changes happen transparently and without surprises in live operations.
overlay.usage.assurance.items.2.title: Clear operating boundaries.
overlay.usage.assurance.items.2.body: Locally operated AI reduces external dependencies and clarifies responsibilities.
overlay.partner.title: Why partners win with Indiebox.
overlay.partner.body: If you run customer projects, you need a platform that is robust in practice and easy to justify in decision rounds.
overlay.partner.arguments.title: Key arguments
overlay.partner.arguments.items.0.title: Credible security story in presales.
overlay.partner.arguments.items.0.body: You can clearly show why data stays local and how auditability is achieved.
overlay.partner.arguments.items.1.title: Faster project starts.
overlay.partner.arguments.items.1.body: A consistent technical foundation reduces coordination and shortens time-to-value.
overlay.partner.arguments.items.2.title: Repeatable delivery model.
overlay.partner.arguments.items.2.body: What works for one customer can be rolled out systematically to the next.
overlay.partner.assurance.title: How we ensure this
overlay.partner.assurance.items.0.title: Open, auditable architecture.
overlay.partner.assurance.items.0.body: Established open-source components simplify technical reviews and compliance discussions.
overlay.partner.assurance.items.1.title: Transparent model and tool stack.
overlay.partner.assurance.items.1.body: You do not operate a black box; you work with clearly named components.
overlay.partner.assurance.items.2.title: Fully offline operation is possible.
overlay.partner.assurance.items.2.body: For sensitive environments, the platform can run isolated and still stay productive.
comparison.title: Why Indiebox?
comparison.subline: Compare your options and see why Indiebox is the best choice for private AI.
comparison.cloud.title: Cloud AI
comparison.indie.title: Indiebox
comparison.self.title: Self-hosting
comparison.self.items.0: ✕ Days or weeks of setup time
comparison.note:
Indiebox combines the privacy of self-hosting with the simplicity of cloud AI.
No ongoing costs. No tinkering.
howto.items.0.title: 1. Unbox & Connect
howto.items.0.body:
Connect Indiebox to power and network.
Wi-Fi or Ethernet, done.
howto.items.1.title: 2. Open the browser
howto.items.1.body:
Open the local address in your browser.
No app. No cloud login.
howto.items.2.title: 3. Start
howto.items.2.body:
All models are prepared.
Ready instantly, no configuration.
showcase.title: Your private AI ecosystem
showcase.text:
Use a curated ecosystem of professional AI applications.
One click to install, updates on demand, and no data leakage.
capabilities.docs.title: 1. Chat with documents
capabilities.docs.body:
Upload PDFs, contracts, and reports to analyze content, summarize it, and ask targeted questions.
Everything stays on your network.
capabilities.agents.title: 2. Agents
capabilities.agents.body:
Create agents that connect AI, data, and tools directly in your workflows.
Multi-step logic, autonomous work, executed locally.
capabilities.agents.items.3: Visually configurable and extensible by code
capabilities.models.title: 3. Run all models
capabilities.models.body:
Indiebox comes with powerful models preinstalled.
Add more models as needed and switch instantly.
capabilities.models.items.3: High response quality through local compute
dataSafety.title: Your data stays with you
dataSafety.lead:
By default, not a single byte leaves your network.
No cloud. No telemetry.
dataSafety.body: External services, model downloads, or support access are always disabled and can only be explicitly enabled.
operations.title: A system that just works
operations.lead:
Indiebox runs on a hardened Linux system with clearly separated user and data areas.
Updates, model switching, and support happen only with your approval.
operations.body:
No hidden access.
No surprises in operation.
finalCta.title: Ready for local AI without compromise?
footer.tagline: Private AI. Fully local. No cloud.
spec.title: Indiebox
spec.checks.2: Agent automation platform, chat platform, and models included
spec.bench.highlight.label: parameters, runs locally
spec.bench.sub: Parameter size and inference speed (tokens/s) on Indiebox.
spec.bench.note: * Benchmarks run on Indiebox (Ryzen AI Max 395) using 4-bit quantized GGUF models.
spec.agents.lead: Preinstalled tools for chat, automation, and long-running agents.
spec.agents.items.0.desc: Chat UI for local models, with user management and document chat.
spec.agents.items.1.desc: Agent runtime for long-running tasks: memory, tools, and persistence.
spec.agents.items.2.desc: Workflow automation for integrations, triggers, and data pipelines.
spec.agents.items.3.title: Model library
spec.agents.items.3.desc: Curated, runs locally, and fast to switch between models.
spec.agents.note: Everything runs locally and is configured so external access stays disabled until you explicitly enable it.
